## What changed

<!-- One or two sentences naming the concrete edit. -->

## Why

<!-- The failure mode, quality bar, or use case this addresses. -->

## What was tested

<!--
If the change touches a prompt, name at least one real target or scenario you ran it against.
If the change touches docs or structure, note what you verified (links, formatting, navigation).

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the writing style in the relevant CONTRIBUTING.md (no em dashes, no filler, direct sentences).
- [ ] Tested against at least one real target or scenario if this is a prompt change.
- [ ] Preserves the design principles of the prompt being edited.
- [ ] README, CONTRIBUTING, or related docs updated if behavior changed.
